news.title: India to start carbon credit trading after four months: Power minister Manohar Lal
news.india_relevance: This marks the formal operationalization of India's domestic carbon market, a critical step for industrial decarbonization.
news.why_it_matters: It creates a financial incentive for Indian firms to reduce emissions and establishes a regulated pricing mechanism for carbon offsets.

news.title: Why SEBI’s latest mutual fund move matters for redemptions
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts the liquidity management and exit safety for millions of Indian retail mutual fund investors.
news.why_it_matters: The move addresses systemic risks in debt and equity funds, ensuring fund houses can meet redemption pressure during market stress.

news.title: India’s EdTech bubble has burst. What happens now?
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the structural collapse of a sector that attracted billions in FDI and was a major employer in the Indian tech ecosystem.
news.why_it_matters: The shift from hyper-growth to sustainability marks a maturity phase for Indian startups and a cautionary tale for venture capital.

news.title: Generic versions of Novo Nordisk’s semaglutide begin to flow, priced 50-80% lower than the innovator
news.india_relevance: India's pharmaceutical prowess is making expensive weight-loss and diabetes treatments accessible to a massive domestic patient base.
news.why_it_matters: Aggressive generic pricing will disrupt the metabolic health market and challenge the pricing power of global pharma giants in India.

news.title: Japanese investment in Indian finance hits record as business ties tighten
news.india_relevance: Reflects a strategic shift in capital flows as Japanese lenders and insurers pivot from China to the Indian financial services sector.
news.why_it_matters: Increased Japanese capital provides long-term, low-cost funding for Indian NBFCs and banks, deepening the domestic credit market.

news.title: Strait of Hormuz disruption could hit India's LPG supplies, refined product markets more vulnerable than crude oil markets: Report
news.india_relevance: India relies heavily on the Gulf for LPG, which is crucial for both rural cooking fuel and urban industrial use.
news.why_it_matters: A supply shock in LPG has a more immediate and painful impact on Indian household inflation than crude oil price volatility.

news.title: India Modifies MSME Credit Guarantee Scheme, Adds Service Sector And Eases Equipment Cost Requirement - Swarajyamag
news.india_relevance: Expands the safety net for India's largest employment-generating sector beyond just manufacturing.
news.why_it_matters: By including services and easing equipment costs, the government is attempting to spur credit-led growth in the broader MSME ecosystem.

news.title: Centre scraps air fare cap as airline operations stabilize
news.india_relevance: Ends a period of heavy-handed price regulation in the Indian aviation sector, allowing market forces to dictate pricing.
news.why_it_matters: While it allows airlines to manage spiraling fuel costs, it may lead to significant fare hikes for Indian travelers during peak seasons.

news.title: Migrant labourers of Surat returning home due to LPG shortage
news.india_relevance: Highlights how energy supply chain disruptions directly impact industrial labor stability in India's textile and diamond hubs.
news.why_it_matters: Energy shortages are causing reverse migration, which could lead to labor shortages and production delays in key export sectors.

news.title: LPG price surge cuts food orders, shrinks delivery rider earnings
news.india_relevance: Demonstrates the second-order effects of energy inflation on India's massive gig economy and urban consumption.
news.why_it_matters: Higher input costs for restaurants reduce order volumes, directly hitting the take-home pay of millions of delivery partners.

news.title: Govt raises commercial LPG allocation to up to 50%; latest increase specifically for restaurants, dhabas, canteens
news.india_relevance: A direct policy intervention to prevent a total shutdown of India's massive informal and formal food services sector.
news.why_it_matters: The prioritization of commercial users over others indicates the government's focus on preventing business closures and job losses.

news.title: West Asia crisis hits smartphone supply, India shipment outlook cut again
news.india_relevance: India is one of the world's largest smartphone markets; supply disruptions hit both local manufacturing and retail sales.
news.why_it_matters: Logistics delays and component shortages will likely lead to higher gadget prices and slower digital adoption in the near term.

news.title: ‘Need enough buffers to deal with any kind of volatility, inflation impact to be seen through multiple channels’, says Nomura’s Sonal Varma
news.india_relevance: Provides a professional macro-economic lens on how the Middle East conflict will transmit into the Indian economy.
news.why_it_matters: Warns that inflation won't just come from fuel, but through complex channels like logistics and imported input costs.

news.title: In cash we trust: The rise of direct transfers in election playbooks

news.title: India’s coal imports dip 4.2% as domestic production rises amid global price surge
